overall.description: A cinematic exploration of the Divination Classroom from Hogwarts Legacy, showcasing a circular gothic room with rich tapestries, crystal balls, and ornate ceiling fixtures. The camera smoothly navigates the space, revealing detailed interior elements including a cozy reading nook and an intricate mechanical ceiling structure.

events.description: camera pulls back from ceiling tapestry to reveal the classroom interior

agents.ego_description: panning down from the ceiling tapestry to survey the classroom layout and furnishings

entered.detail: large tapestry depicting a robed figure with a tower, hanging from the ceiling
golden chandelier with radiating sun motif suspended from the dome
heavy red drapery framing the tall gothic windows
tall diamond-paned windows with stone tracery
round wooden tables with embroidered cloths arranged in the center
glowing crystal orbs on stands atop the divination tables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up of the central ceiling tapestry before the camera pulls back to reveal the full Divination Classroom. The circular gothic space features red velvet curtains, tall arched windows, and wooden tables arranged with glowing crystal balls beneath an ornate sun chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: main classroom floor with divination equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the main classroom floor observing the divination tables and equipment

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking toward the blackboard on the left wall

entered.detail: dark chalkboard with diagrams mounted on the stone wall
tall decorative ceramic urn beside the blackboard
smaller decorative tapestry hanging on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the main classroom floor, passing divination tables with crystal balls. A female NPC walks toward the blackboard on the left wall, while the camera reveals additional wall tapestries and decorative elements like a large ceramic vase.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level reading nook with bookshelves

events.description: camera ascends curved stairs to the back corner reading area

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stairs to explore the upper reading nook and bookshelves

entered.detail: tall dark wood bookcase filled with leather-bound volumes
plush red leather reading chair with wooden frame
brass floor lamp with glowing shade beside the armchair
small table lamp with green glass shade on a wooden desk
heavy dark curtains dividing the reading nook from the main room

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends curved stairs to a cozy reading nook in the back corner, featuring a tall bookshelf, leather armchair, and warm lighting from brass lamps. Heavy black curtains frame the view back to the main classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: central classroom area beneath the domed ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the ornate ceiling chandelier
focus shifts to the mechanical ceiling structure with rotating elements

agents.ego_description: returning to the classroom center and examining the ceiling fixtures and architecture

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the curtained entrance before moving away

entered.detail: intricate rotating astronomical mechanism with symbols and gears set into the ceiling
round tables with crystal balls seen from the opposite side of the room

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main classroom floor, the camera passes through black curtains and moves toward the center. After briefly showing an NPC near the entrance, the camera tilts upward to reveal the ornate sun chandelier and an intricate mechanical ceiling dome with rotating astronomical elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a detailed ceiling view and descends to explore the depths of the Divination Classroom before ascending back toward the astronomical heights of the dome. It begins with a close-up of a central tapestry, pulling back to reveal a circular gothic space filled with red velvet curtains, arched windows, and tables topped with glowing crystal balls. As the camera glides across the main floor, it passes a female NPC walking toward a blackboard and brushes past decorative wall tapestries and a large ceramic vase. The perspective then ascends curved stairs into a cozy reading nook featuring a leather armchair and brass lamps, before descending back through heavy black curtains to the classroom center. Finally, the camera passes a figure near the entrance and tilts upward to reveal the ornate sun chandelier and the rotating mechanical elements of the intricate ceiling dome.
